# Swords
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Swords&prop=wikitext

'''Swords''' are used by [[Warrior]]s, [[Paladin]]s and [[Knight]]s.

==Production {{PAGENAME}}==
'''''For production {{PAGENAME}} please follow this [https://www.realmeye.com/wiki/swords link].'''''

==Custom {{PAGENAME}}==
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Dreadstump's Rapier|u}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Fang of Frost|u}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Sword of the Aquatic God|u}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Sword of the Demon Lord|u}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Sword of the Fallen|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Blade of the Fallen Sky|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|The Seaweed Sword|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Shadowbone Sword|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Shattered War Axe|l}}
|-
| {{ItemDisplay|Omega Ancient Sword|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Rotting Arm|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Throwing Spear|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Enchanted Uru Sword|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Gungnir|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Sword of Oryx|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Bel's Decapitator|p}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Thusala's Slasher|p}}
|}
===Starforce {{PAGENAME}}===
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Starbuster Blade|g}}
|}
